caption: A woman wearing a striped button-down shirt and black over-ear headphones sits in an indoor setting. Behind her is a light-colored wall, a beige curtain, and a glimpse of a blue fabric. A piece of light-colored furniture is partially visible to her right. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in white in the lower-left corner of her video feed. Throughout the sequence, the woman is centered in the frame, looking slightly downward and to the side. Her expression shifts from a neutral, contemplative look to one where her mouth opens as if she is speaking or reacting. Her head tilts slightly as she changes her facial expression, but she remains stationary in her seat. The background and lighting remain consistent across the entire sequence.
